name: smoke-test
description: 2-stage pipeline to verify: config loading, topo sort, sequential execution, $prev data flow, gate decisions, status display

stages.name: generate
stages.prompt: Write a short 3-sentence product description for a fictional AI-powered coffee machine called 'BrewMind'. Write it to the output file.

stages.name: review
stages.prompt: Read the previous stage's output file (the product description for BrewMind). Write a brief review: rate it 1-10 and suggest one improvement. Write your review to the output file. Reference specific text from the original to prove you read $prev.
